notes: Shot order mirrors the kShots[] table in main.cpp. Each full-frame shot produces one screenshot_NNNNNN.png in order — the Nth entry here maps to the Nth full-frame screenshot by numeric index. ROI crop captures (screenshot_NNNNNN_<label>__crop_*.png) are inspection-only and are NOT part of the comparison set; render-verify's _collect_shots filters them out, so this list must enumerate only the full-frame shots. Reference PNGs live in sibling subdirs named after the CMake preset (e.g. macos-debug/, linux-debug/) since GL and Metal produce pixel-different output.
